category_sources: source_facts.description describes Gemgen as a command-line tool converting CommonMark Markdown to Gemtext.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and source_facts.homepage identify the project as gemgen.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official SourceHut project page and best supplied official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is https://git.sr.ht/~kota/gemgen/archive/v0.6.0.tar.gz, identifying the official SourceHut Git repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description states it converts CommonMark Markdown to Gemtext; source_facts.executables lists the gemgen CLI.
